constraints: The scene depicts a bedroom interior.
There is a large window visible in the room.
Heavy curtains are fully closed and drawn shut.
The lighting in the room is soft and warm.
There is no indication of wind (e.g., no movement in curtains or objects).
The image is a photorealistic photograph.
